review_title: Easy to use and good performance
description: I use DataGrip often to access data on various databases and types of databases. The queries execute and the results are shown quickly; I don't feel that I wait long for the response.
author: Chuck K.
pros: The interface is very intuitive, making it easy to be connected to multiple databases and execute queries against them.
cons: Very minor concern where getting a connection set up properly is not always the easiest to understand. Again, this is minor as once it is set up, everything works really well.

description: Datagrip provides a great experience to work on the database. And its's reduce a lot of time of development.
author: vijay B.
pros: It's a good software tool to write queries and create databases and tables. previously we used Postgres compare to datagrip it's quite good. Because of datagrip backup the queries in a history. and the simple interface to using the database is great. And some shortcuts are very useful to improve the development time.
cons: Fetching the table suggestion is not great because we have to refresh sometimes. and also they have to improve to performance of IDE overall.

review_title: DataGrip randomly disconnected from my DB and now wont connect
author: Jose L.
pros: When it worked I loved the functionality. and the ease of use. but unfortunately I cannot get it to work and connect to my postgres DB
cons: that it disconnected out of nowhere and I had to switch to something else
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Fantastic database client with a ton of great features, making it fast and easy to develop great solutions.
cons: The product is a little heavy compared to some less bulky database clients, so if all you need is a simple client, this may not be for you.

author: Keerthi R.
pros: Datagrip comes with a lot of functionality, it has very good integration with git, and the autocomplete feature is really helpful when writing queries. We can also add lots of packages and plugins that can be useful.
cons: Pricing can be expensive for smaller companies.

review_title: The most advanced database administration tool in the market
description: As data analysts querying the Data Warehouse all day long, DataGrip is our tool of choice for manipulating data. DataGrip is very customizable and is a comfortable work environment for us. It has all the connectors we needed. However, DataGrip is very much a technical tool and looks like one, with a very difficult learning curve and no onboarding at all.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Datagrip is certainly the best designed and most advanced tool for database management and using SQL databases and data warehouses in general. It is very complete and there aren't any features missing. It is also very customizable to suit the developer's needs.
cons: DataGrip is a very technical and professional tool. It is not designed to be friendly or easy to use, it doesn't offer any onboarding, so it has a long learning curve until one feels comfortable and confident using it. It also has so many features most users end up not exploring.

description: very nice and convienent, love the many features
author: Keith T.
pros: Has a ton of features like any intelliJ product, many plugins and tools, same layout as everything else, and
cons: running a query is a bit awkward when there is another prompt/popup, especially if i want it quick. the window that the query results pops up in is also a bit awkward and could use more customization.

review_title: Smart SQL editor for professional database developers
description: Overall Experience-1. Quick Data fetching for urgent requirements.2. Saves time on writing DML queries while editing RDBMS directly.3. Provides option to dump the data in different formats like CSV, Clipboard, etc.
author: Shubham P.
pros: The things I like the most are-1. Documents are available which brings much help while implementing to the current system.2. While creating tables & columns it provide suggestive names.3. Gets a lot of supportive libraries.
cons: Cons feels while integrating the data grip are-1. Its a very heavy app which take a lot of time & space.2. Due to this the perfect hardware requirement increases and increases the cost.3. No free version available to use and decide to consider

description: Its very good experience using this tool it reduces lots of time and increase the productivity.
author: Pinki K.
pros: Best part is it provides suggestions of query as well as scheme, table, function etc. Names which reduces the time. And so many shortcuts are there to open definition of Store procedure or function. And can execute multiple select and show the results.
cons: For fetching suggestions of database sometimes not work. Some time its stuck so need to work on performance.

description: Its quite good experience using this tool before that we are using PGadmin which is not that much easy to use.
author: Prakash C.
pros: We are using it to connect Postgres database for writing queries. Its very easy to write query as it provides some auto complete query by default and provide some shortcut keys for opening definition of SP or function.
cons: Need to work more on some default query parameters and some time its problematic while refresh the data scheme.

description: Experiencia muy buena, lo recomiendo totalmente
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Me gusta la facilidad de uso que tiene, además se trabajan las bases de datos muy bien
cons: No hay nada que no me haya gustado, lo recomiendo totalmente

review_title: A useful tool for managing SQL databases
author: Jiaxin F.
pros: DataGrip simplies the tasks of managing SQL databases and writing queries.
cons: DataGrip doesn't offer features for data visualisation.

review_title: The Perfect tool for Database Management
author: Hasan D.
pros: The support for multiple programming languages
cons: DataGrip is a paid tool and may not be affordable for all users.

review_title: IDE application for various database types
description: DataGrip is a useful and provides extended functions. You can easily backup and restore database data. Using this tool is more intuitive than other products offer. There are still some bugs but overall experience is great.
author: Martin P.
pros: DataGrip uses the common UI/UX as other popular tools from Jetbrains vendor. The application is designed as IDE which provides support for lots of database server types. You are allowed to run scripts right in the console but interface also provides some powerfull functions in context menu. Data editor and viewer is also available. You can backup and restore dumps really smoothly using simple dialog.
cons: Creating some new tables pass the validation process but the script failed to run. It will be better to implement extended validations to handle problems when the script. When I backup my database settings the sources are not backed up and I can't restore them. I also have some problems when entering empty values in table view data editor.

author: Sabino Eduardo Q.
pros: DataGrip es simplemente un gran aliado. Esta herramienta es una maravilla para gestionar bases de datos. Sus características de autocompletado y resaltado de sintaxis hacen que la escritura de consultas sea fluida y rápida. Además, su capacidad para conectarse a múltiples bases de datos a la vez ha mejorado significativamente mi productividad. Además, la visualización de datos es intuitiva, lo que facilita el análisis. En resumen, DataGrip ha elevado mi rendimiento al siguiente nivel.
cons: Posiblemente un punto negativo de DataGrip es su costo, ya que puede resultar un tanto caro para usuarios individuales o pequeñas empresas.

review_title: Connect to your database using DataGrip to write efficient SQL !
description: The tool to experience databases in a different way. Use it understand more !
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The database client tool helps you to connect to most of the latest databases and explore the data easily using its feature loaded utilities . The database tables can be modeled and relationship between the tables can be established .
cons: The product could come up with community edition as a free service to experience it . The product only comes up with 30 day free trail , which is not so great !

review_title: Datagrip is a consistent interface to all your databases
description: Excellent tool and if you use databases every day, with multiple projects, then you can't go wrong.
author: Simon D.
pros: Logical and well thought out interface with the ability to organise pain and projects just how you want them. Very good connection options and speedy and quick responses with the ability to build complex queries.Very good syntax highlighting and intelllisense like parsing of code and queries.Ad-hoc filtering on result sets is very useful.
cons: Sometimes the schemas remain hidden and you wonder why...until you find them.

description: We used this application to store the information coming from the front end pages we wrote in our company, we transferred the information to the database and managed it thanks to this application.
author: Barış T.
pros: The interface of the application is simple and user-friendly. Easy to use. Same interface as other Jetbrains apps. You can connect to your database and manage it easily.
cons: There is nothing wrong with the app. Users will notice.

description: I used Datagrip to store my python database for our AI content hub project.
author: Anil C.
pros: Datagrip has essential features for database collectors, to set your all data and cover it.
cons: Datagrip has no any bad feature, it has many imports and you can save time it's complications.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: For developers, data monitoring, data sniffing and SQL editor features make it really easy to use. also the data migration capabilities are great for migrating to live systems.
cons: There is a wide range of alternatives for developers to use many similar capabilities at no cost.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's interface is easy to use . It's helps to move data from devices . It's functionality are excellent. Easy to understand. Manage multiple databases at same time
cons: Here i face advertisment issue and its Security level issue .

description: Muy buena experiencia, lo recomiendo totalmente
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Lo que más me gusta es la facilidad para gestionar varias bbdd a la vez
cons: A veces se tarda en sincronizar los datos cuando son grandes

description: We were working on SQL server only but then we started multiple databases like postgres and mysql then we implemented the Datagrip in our organisation and it helped us a lot by reducing the switching time of different databases. Somehow it require some more in intellisense and more RAM too. If you are thinking of managing your multiple DB then this is a good option.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Datagrip has helped us to manage the multiple Databases using single IDE. Earlier Only SQL-Server was there but when we started Postgres and My-SQL too then it helped a lot as the switching time was reduced.
cons: It needs to work on the intellisense and while using it I faced that system was lagging.

review_title: Poderosa herramienta de base de datos
author: alexandra A.
pros: Me encanta DataGrip, es una herramienta con un diseño excelente y va maravilla para gestionar bases de datos en general. Su diseño es muy completo e incluye muchas herramientas para simplificar porcesos. Además, es posible personalizarlo para adaptarlo a mis necesidades como desarrolladora.
cons: DataGrip es una herramienta muy poderosa pero enfocada a personas con conocimientos avanzados. Así que alguién con una noción básica de manejo de bases de datos requerirá mucho tiempo en poder desenvolverse por la plataforma.

review_title: A trustworthy and effective tool for concurrently managing several datasets
description: Using DataGrip for database management and administration in my company has been advantageous to me. Because of its intuitive panels, it has made creating and managing different databases easier for me and saved me time. It has also made the system practical and easy to use. Because of its extensive support for numerous database engines, which I use on a daily basis, it has become into a resource that I cannot live without.
author: Madhusudan S.
pros: This tool is easy to use and appealing to me because its panels and interface are for handling both local and distant databases. The superb features and capabilities of DataGrip facilitate and expedite our job.We are able to manage multiple databases at once.
cons: This software tends to slow down and perform worse since it uses a lot of resources, which indicates that it is being used frequently.
